arts.ttl: Chris Wilder Makes Strong Remark About Recent Sheffield United Performances Ahead of Middlesbrough Test
arts.sum: Sheffield United will look to extend their winning streak to three games when they host Middlesbrough at Bramall Lane on Wednesday night. The Blades have shown resilience in recent outings, securing results despite unconvincing performances. arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's trust as he explains Middlesbrough centre-back transfer decision
arts.sum: Michael Carrick has explained how a range of factors ultimately influenced his decision to not pursue a new centre-back in January - the main one being his trust in his current options. It’s understood that together with the recruitment team, Carrick did assess options in the market after being presented with a list of centre-backs that might be available.

arts.ttl: The starting spot battle that could reignite Middlesbrough's top-six aspirations - Eric Paylor
arts.sum: The big difference is that Conway has hit the back of the net on eight occasions this season while Iheanacho, following an unproductive spell at Sevilla, is still awaiting his first goal of the campaign. Conway’s timely return from injury paves the way for hot competition with new boy Iheanacho to win a place in the starting line-up.

arts.ttl: The four biggest Middlesbrough problems Michael Carrick must solve after busy transfer window
arts.sum: However, in a side that has been so defensively vulnerable all season, Giles’ return brings with it a challenge for Carrick in terms of ensuring Boro don’t leave themselves overly exposed by Giles’ attacking exploits. Ben Doak’s injury only adds to the pressure, particularly on Whittaker, to make an immediate impact, with Boro in need of results and improved attacking displays after losing their spark in recent weeks.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder's Middlesbrough verdict and Sheffield United team news with post-January point made
arts.sum: Offering his verdict on his former side though, Wilder insisted: “It was a tough game up there and I’ve said they are one of the outstanding teams in the division, who are well coached and managed and a good group of players. “One of the biggest things I have looked at over the weekend is when you look at the team and what the players have done - to win the most games of football in the division and have points total that we do - we are still building.

arts.ttl: Difficult Middlesbrough spell for Lukas Engel ends with MLS switch, initially on loan
arts.sum: Engel’s exit comes after Boro secured the loan capture of Ryan Giles from Hull City last month. However, Boro confirmed the loan had gone through on Tuesday morning after Engel played Saturday's pre-season victory over Philadelphia Union as a trialist.
